description: Studio slide asset pack — the genuine source-of-truth for kuat-studio. The slides equivalent of web's component library: skills BUILD FROM and COMPARE AGAINST these assets; they never improvise or recreate them.

master.provenance: Slimmed + font-fixed from '2026 EE branded master slides' (Google Slides canonical; PPTX export). 79 example slides + 125 orphan media stripped (51.5 MB -> 18.9 MB); theme Arial->Lexend; off-brand Montserrat removed; Lora + JetBrains Mono embedded. Raw 51 MB export kept external — see docs/migration/LOG.md (Phase 4S, decision A).

layouts._note: Verified layouts for the build-from-master path; index is the python-pptx slide_masters[0].slide_layouts index. The master ships 65 layouts; fuller layout-map curation is deferred (Phase 4S out-of-scope).

logo._rule: create-* INSERT the genuine logo — inherited from the master layouts; NEVER recreate, redraw, or re-letter it. If an asset can't be resolved, STOP and flag — do not fabricate a mark. review-* COMPARE a deck's logo against these files; a recreation (e.g. a hand-drawn [E]) is a brand FAIL regardless of colour or placement.

wordmark-white.use: Primary EE lockup (bracket-E + EQUAL EXPERTS wordmark), white variant — title bar, dark / section slides. The canonical mark reviews compare against.

bracket.description: Left-side '[' bracket — a full-height tech-blue element on the LEFT EDGE of content / section layouts. This is the brand signature. It is NOT a top-left + bottom-right corner frame (the old reference described it wrongly).
bracket.color: Tech blue (per the master); resolve the exact value from reference/design-language/colours.md
bracket.inheritance: Comes for free when a deck is built from the master layouts; a prose description cannot reproduce it faithfully (the Phase-4 deck proved this).

iconLibrary.note: An ~80-icon library is inherited from the master media and used in-place via the layouts. Not individually catalogued in this manifest (deferred with the layout-map curation).

fonts.note: Lexend (the brand sans) was already embedded in the master. Lora (serif) + JetBrains Mono (code) static instances were sourced (OFL) and embedded by prep-master.py so decks render correctly on any machine.

photography.policy: No EE photography / image library ships yet. create-presentation uses explicitly-marked placeholders that BLOCK release; review-presentation treats placeholder imagery as a release blocker. Building the EE image library is a separate future asset-pack addition.
